description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa upholstered in a blue fabric with a subtle, irregular linear pattern. The sofa features a continuous, rounded frame that seamlessly integrates the armrests and backrest, giving it a soft, enveloping appearance. Three loose cushions are arranged on the seat and back: two larger, square cushions on either side and a smaller, rectangular cushion in the center. The armrests are wide and gently slope outward, matching the height of the backrest for a unified silhouette. The base of the sofa is fully upholstered, with no visible legs, contributing to a grounded and monolithic look. The overall design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern blue two-seater sofa with rounded, continuous armrests and back, featuring three loose cushions and a fully upholstered base with a subtle linear pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's thick, rounded armrest and the depth of the seat with visible cushion arrangement.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three loose cushions, wide seat, and the sofa's enveloping, curved frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the left, displaying the armrest's thickness and the sofa's monolithic base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, fully upholstered backrest and the sofa's seamless, rounded silhouette.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose cushions: two large square cushions on either side and one smaller rectangular cushion in the center, all placed on the seat and backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are wide, fully integrated with the backrest, rounded, and slope gently outward, matching the height of the backrest with thick padding and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving a monolithic, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high, continuous, and curved, forming a single piece with the armrests, with no visible tufting or segmentation; loose cushions provide additional support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery features a subtle, irregular linear pattern in blue tones, giving a textured, contemporary look without decorative stitching or tufting.
